title: Bahrain National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2028
summary: Establishes Bahrain’s four-year national cybersecurity framework across cyber resilience, governance, collaboration, awareness, workforce development, and cyber research, with direct focus on CNI protection, standardized risk management, regulation, compliance, and national cyber resilience.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Current national cybersecurity strategy for Bahrain.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.critical_infrastructure: Current national cybersecurity strategy prioritising CNI resilience.

notes: Related instruments: Supersedes Bahrain National Cyber Security Strategy 2020-2024 and supports Baseline Cyber Security Controls, CNI Cybersecurity Controls, and National Cybersecurity Risk Management Framework
